mapper.sql: id, real_name, name, employee_num, pass, tel, email, unitID, depID, roleID, state, salt, logintime,email_lock,idcard,uniqid, wxunionid,wxphone
mapper.select: select u.name from unit u where u.id = #{unitID}
select t.name from department t where t.id = #{depID}
select t.name from role t where t.id = #{roleID}
select t.cname from role t where t.id = #{roleID}

select tc.cid as cid from teacher t left join role_permission rp on t.roleid = rp.rid left join permission p on rp.pid = p.id left join teacher_course tc on t.id = tc.tid where t.id = #{id} and tc.getperbyrole = 1 and p.id in(0,10,11) union select tc.cid as cid from teacher_permission tp left join permission p on tp.pid = p.id left join teacher_course tc on tp.tid = tc.tid and tp.cid = tc.cid where tp.tid = #{id} and tc.getperbyrole = 0 and p.id in(0,10,11)
select t.id from course t where t.state !=0
select distinct tp.cid from teacher_permission tp where exists (select * from teacher t where tp.tid = t.id and t.unitid = #{unitid})
select distinct(q.cid) from question_db q left join course c on c.id=q.cid where q.state = 2 and c.state=1

select distinct(tp.cid) from teacher_permission tp inner join course c on c.id = tp.cid where tp.pid in(0,10,11) and tp.tid=#{uid} and c.state = 1 and c.id in
#{item}
select distinct(tp.cid) from teacher_permission tp inner join course c on c.id = tp.cid where tp.pid in(0,10,11) and tp.tid=#{uid} and c.state != 0
select t.id from course t where t.state = 0
select t.id from TEACHER t where t.unitid = #{unitId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select distinct(tp.cid) from teacher_permission tp where tp.pid in(0,10,11) and tp.tid=#{uid}
select distinct(tp.cid) from teacher_permission tp where tp.pid in(32) and tp.tid=#{uid}

select
from teacher t where t.id = #{userId} and t.state = 1

select
from teacher t where t.name = #{username} and t.state = 1 and rownum=1

select
from teacher t where t.wxunionid = #{wxUnionID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t.state = 1

select
from teacher t where t.tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t.state = 1

select
from teacher t where t.employee_num = #{num} and t.state = 1

select
from teacher t where Lower(t.name) = Lower(#{username}) and rownum=1

select
from teacher t where idcard = #{cardid} and rownum=1
select t.id from teacher t where t.real_name = #{realname} and t.state = 1
mapper.delete: delete from teacher t where t.id = #{tid}
delete from teacher_permission tp where tp.tid=#{tid}
delete from teacher_paper tp where tp.tid=#{tid}
delete from teacher_class tc where tc.tid=#{tid}
delete from teacher_question tq where tq.tid=#{tid}
delete from teacher_scorereview ts where ts.tid=#{tid}
mapper.update:
update teacher
real_name = #{realname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
idcard = #{idcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
uniqid = #{uniqid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
employee_num = #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pass = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state},
logintime = #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
unitid = #{unitID,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
roleid = #{roleID,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
depid = #{depID,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salt = #{salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email_lock = #{email_lock,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wxphone = #{wxphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wxunionid = #{wxunionid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update teacher set state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert when (not exists (select 1 from teacher where name = #{username}) ) then into teacher
id,
real_name,
name,
employee_num,
pass,
tel,
email,
state,
logintime,
unitid,
roleid,
depid,
salt,
idcard,
uniqid,
employee_num,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{realname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{state},
#{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{unitID,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{roleID,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{depID,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{idcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{uniqid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{employee_num,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.select:
select c.id as cid, c.name_c as cname, u.name as uname, d.name as dname from (select distinct cid from teacher_permission tp where tp.tid = #{uid}) tc inner join course c on tc.cid = c.id
and (c.name_c like '%'||#{cname}||'%' or c.name_c = #{cname,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
left join unit u on u.id = c.unitid left join department d on d.id = c.deptid where c.state = 1

select count(*) as NUM from (select distinct cid from teacher_permission tp where tp.tid = #{uid}) tc inner join course c on tc.cid = c.id
and (c.name_c like '%'||#{cname}||'%' or c.name_c = #{cname,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
left join unit u on u.id = c.unitid left join department d on d.id = c.deptid where c.state = 1

select c.id as cid, c.name_c as cname, u.name as uname, d.name as dname from course c left join unit u on u.id = c.unitid left join department d on d.id = c.deptid where c.id not in (select distinct(tp.cid) from teacher_permission tp where tp.pid not in('14','40') and tp.tid = #{tid}) and c.unitid = (select t.unitid from teacher t where t.id = #{tid})
and (c.name_c like '%'||#{cname}||'%' or c.name_c = #{cname,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and c.id in (select distinct(tp.cid) from teacher_permission tp where tp.tid=#{uid})
and c.state = 1

select count(*) as NUM from course c left join unit u on u.id = c.unitid left join department d on d.id = c.deptid where c.id not in (select distinct(tp.cid) from teacher_permission tp where tp.pid not in('14','40') and tp.tid = #{tid}) and c.unitid = (select t.unitid from teacher t where t.id = #{tid})
and (c.name_c like '%'||#{cname}||'%' or c.name_c = #{cname,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and c.id in (select distinct(tp.cid) from teacher_permission tp where tp.tid=#{uid})
and c.state = 1

select c.id as cid, c.name_c as cname, u.name as uname, d.name as dname from course c left join unit u on u.id = c.unitid left join department d on d.id = c.deptid where c.id not in (select distinct(tp.cid) from teacher_permission tp where tp.pid not in('14','40') and tp.tid = #{tid}) and c.unitid != (select t.unitid from teacher t where t.id = #{tid})
and (c.name_c like '%'||#{cname}||'%' or c.name_c = #{cname,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and c.id in (select distinct(tp.cid) from teacher_permission tp where tp.tid=#{uid})
and c.state = 1

select count(*) as NUM from course c left join unit u on u.id = c.unitid left join department d on d.id = c.deptid where c.id not in (select distinct(tp.cid) from teacher_permission tp where tp.pid not in('14','40') and tp.tid = #{tid}) and c.unitid != (select t.unitid from teacher t where t.id = #{tid})
and (c.name_c like '%'||#{cname}||'%' or c.name_c = #{cname,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and c.id in (select distinct(tp.cid) from teacher_permission tp where tp.tid=#{uid})
and c.state = 1
select r.name from role r, teacher t where r.id = t.roleid and t.name = #{name}

select t2.id as id,t2.name as username,t2.roleid as roleid from teacher t2 where t2.roleid='2'
union select t.id as id,t.name as username,t.roleid as roleid from teacher t where t.depid=#{depid} and t.roleid in('4','5','6')
union select t.id as id,t.name as username,t.roleid as roleid from teacher t where t.unitid=#{unitid} and t.roleid in('3')

select
from teacher t where t.id != #{uid}
and t.unitid = #{unitid}
and t.roleid = #{roleid}
and t.depid = #{depid}
and roleID in (3,4,5,6,7)
and roleID in (3,4,5,6,7) and unitid = (select unitid from teacher where name = #{username})
and roleID in (4,5,6) and depid = (select depid from teacher where name = #{username})
and roleID in (4,5) and depid = (select depid from teacher where name = #{username})
and roleID in (4,5) and depid = (select depid from teacher where name = #{username})
and (name like '%'||#{uname}||'%' or real_name like '%'||#{uname}||'%')
order by name
order by real_name
order by roleid
order by unitid
order by depid
order by logintime
order by idcard
desc
asc
select tid as tid, cid as cid, pid as pid from teacher_permission where tid = #{tid} and pid in (14,40)
mapper.delete: delete from teacher_permission t where t.tid = #{tid} and t.pid = 40
mapper.insert: insert when (not exists (select 1 from teacher_permission where tid = #{tid} and pid = 40) ) then into teacher_permission(tid, pid) (select #{tid}, 40 from dual)
mapper.update:
update teacher
real_name = #{realname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
employee_num = #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pass = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=BIT},
logintime = #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
unitid = #{unitID,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
roleid = #{roleID,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
depid = #{depID,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salt = #{salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
idcard = #{idcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where name = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select
from teacher t where t.id in ( select tp.tid from teacher_permission tp where tp.cid = #{cid}) t.unitid=(select c.unitid from course c where c.id=#{cid}) and t.roleid != 1 and t.state = 1
and t.id != (select c.creatorid from course c where c.id = #{cid})
and t.unitid = #{unitid}
and t.roleid = #{roleid}
and roleID in (3,4,5,6)
and roleID in (3,4,5,6) and unitid = (select unitid from teacher where name = #{username})
and roleID in (4,5,6) and depid = (select depid from teacher where name = #{username})
and roleID in (4,5) and depid = (select depid from teacher where name = #{username})
and roleID in (4,5) and depid = (select depid from teacher where name = #{username})
and (name like '%'||#{uname}||'%' or real_name like '%'||#{uname}||'%')
order by name
order by real_name
order by roleid
order by unitid
order by depid
order by logintime
order by depid
desc
asc

select count(*) as num from teacher t where t.unitid=(select c.unitid from course c where c.id=#{cid}) and t.roleid != 1 and t.state = 1
and t.id != (select c.creatorid from course c where c.id = #{cid})
and t.unitid = #{unitid}
and t.roleid = #{roleid}
and roleID in (3,4,5,6)
and roleID in (3,4,5,6) and unitid = (select unitid from teacher where name = #{username})
and roleID in (4,5,6) and depid = (select depid from teacher where name = #{username})
and roleID in (4,5) and depid = (select depid from teacher where name = #{username})
and roleID in (4,5) and depid = (select depid from teacher where name = #{username})
and (name like '%'||#{uname}||'%' or real_name like '%'||#{uname}||'%')

select
from teacher t where t.id not in (select tid from teacher_permission where tid is not null and cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by tid) and t.roleid != 1 and t.state = 1
and t.unitid = #{unitid}
and t.roleid = #{roleid}
and t.depid = #{depid}
and roleID in (3,4,5,6)
and roleID in (3,4,5,6) and unitid = (select unitid from teacher where id = #{uid})
and roleID in (4,5,6) and depid = (select depid from teacher where id = #{uid})
and roleID in (4,5) and depid = (select depid from teacher where id = #{uid})
and roleID in (4,5) and depid = (select depid from teacher where id = #{uid})
and (t.real_name like '%'||#{uname}||'%' or t.name like '%'||#{uname}||'%')
order by name
order by real_name
order by roleid
order by unitid
order by depid
order by logintime
desc
asc
select id, name, real_name from teacher order by nlssort(real_name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M')

select t.id as tid, t.name as username, t.real_name as name, t.roleid as rid, u.name as unit, d.name as dept from teacher t left join unit u on u.id = t.unitid left join department d on d.id = t.depid where EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM teacher_permission tp WHERE tp.tid = t.id AND tp.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) and t.state = 1
and t.unitid = #{unitid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and t.roleid = #{roleid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and t.depid = #{depid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and (t.real_name like '%'||#{uname}||'%' or t.name like '%'||#{uname}||'%')
and t.roleID in (3,4,5,6,7)
and t.roleID in (3,4,5,6,7) and t.unitid = (select unitid from teacher where id = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and t.roleID in (4,5,6,7) and t.depid = (select depid from teacher where id = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and t.roleID in (4,5,6,7)
and t.roleID in (4,5)
and t.roleID in (4,5,7)
select t.pid from TEACHER_PERMISSION t where t.cid =#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t.tid = #{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select p.id from permission p where p.type = #{type} and p.state = 1 and p.id not in('20','10','14','34','33','30','37','38','31')

select p.id, p.name, p.type, p.pstring from permission p where p.type = #{type} and p.state = 1 and p.id not in('20','10','14','34','33','30','37','38','31')
and p.id in
#{item}
and p.id in('')
select tp.tid, tp.pid from teacher_permission tp where tp.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select email,email_lock from teacher where name = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update teacher t set t.email_lock=#{email_lock} where t.name=#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t.email=#{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select t.id,t.name,t.real_name,u.name||'-'||d.name as dname,nvl(t.employee_num,'') as enum from teacher t left join unit u on u.id=t.unitid left join department d on d.id=t.depid where t.name like '%'||#{name}||'%' or t.real_name like '%'||#{name}||'%'

select t.id from examinfo t where t.teacherid=#{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t.state in (3, 4) and t.mobile = 0 and trunc(t.begindate) <= trunc((select sysdate from dual)) and trunc(t.enddate) >= trunc((select sysdate from dual))
select id, name from teacher where name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select id, name,idcard,uniqid from teacher where idcard = #{cardid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select c.id as cid from course c where c.deptid = (select t.depid from teacher t where t.id = #{uid}) and c.state = 1
select c.id as cid from course c where c.unitid = (select t.unitid from teacher t where t.id = #{uid}) and c.state = 1
mapper.insert: insert into teacher_permission (tid, cid, pid) select #{uid}, #{cid}, #{pid} from dual
mapper.select:
select
from teacher t where t.id not in (select tid from teacher_permission where tid is not null and cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by tid) and t.roleid != 1 and t.state = 1
and t.unitid = #{unitid}
and t.roleid = #{roleid}
and t.depid = #{depid}
and (t.real_name like '%'||#{uname}||'%' or t.name like '%'||#{uname}||'%')
order by name
order by real_name
order by roleid
order by unitid
order by depid
order by logintime
desc
asc
